Package index

All functions

check_input_class()
check input class
check_num_bounds()
check input within bounds
collision-package collision
Per-turbine Collision Risk Model for predicting avian collision with on-shore and off-shore wind turbines
w_from_distmodel() edr_from_distmodel()
extract data from distance model
define_bird()
make a list of bird parameters for input into CRM
define_turbine()
define_turbine
df_obs
Example observations
df_survey
Example survey
ds_example
An object of class dsmodel fit using Distance::ds The example model is fit to the data book.tee.data from mrds
ds_raptor
Distance model example - raptor
encounter_rate()
Calculate uncorrected observed flights / minute of survey from point transects
flights_per_year()
Convert flights per minute to flights per year
n_collision()
Calculate collision rate with static and dynamic avoidance
obs_flux()
Calculate observed flights / time / area from point transects
p_collision_band()
Probability of collision given interaction from Band
parameterise_lnorm()
Given a mean and standard deviation, solves for log normal distribution parameters meanlog and sdlog.
prob_collision_dynamic()
Probability of collision with leading edge of blade
prob_collision_static()
Probability of collision with static turbine
rotate_areas()
Rotate areas
rpm_to_radpersec()
rpm to rad_per_sec
sample_input()
Sample value from chosen distribution
set_random() is.randInput()
Define how to sample a random input
turbine_flights()
Convert observed flight flux to number of flights through turbine plane (i.e. interactions).
turbine_flights_year()
Estimate flights through turbine plane from observations
v90_single
Single turbine example data
vertical_flux_plane_area()
Vertical flux plane area
wte
Wedge-tailed Eagle data

Developed by Elizabeth Stark, Muir Stuart, Yandell Peggy.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
